name: Oprah's Mock Caesar Salad (Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the minced garlic, lemon juice, low-sodium soy sauce, and freshly cracked black pepper until well combined.
2. Toss the torn romaine lettuce and endive in separate bowls with the dressing.
3. Add the chunked tomato to the salad mixture.
4. Combine all ingredients gently, ensuring even distribution of the dressing throughout the salad.
